subcodes.first_line: O Riḍá! This Name hath emerged from the realm of the unseen into the arena of manifestation, that all servants might grasp that which is intended by this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رضا این اسم از عالم غیب بعرصه شهود آمد تا جمیع عباد بانچه مقصود از این
subcodes.subjects: @attaining good pleasure of God, @development of capacity and readiness, @effort; striving, @Crimson Ark; the Ark of God
